additionalInfo.description: Detects desired vs reported state conflicts. Triggered when CLIENT attributes are updated by a device. Compares desired_hvac/desired_dimmer (SHARED) against reported_hvac/reported_dimmer (CLIENT) and sets sync_status accordingly.
Triggers when a device posts CLIENT attributes (reported state)
Load desired_hvac and desired_dimmer from SHARED_SCOPE into metadata
Load reported_hvac and reported_dimmer from CLIENT_SCOPE into metadata
Compare desired vs reported and compute sync_status: SYNCED | OUT_OF_SYNC | PENDING
Persist computed sync_status and timestamps as CLIENT attributes (visible on Sync Dashboard)
Branch: only out-of-sync devices trigger re-send
Re-send HVAC command when HVAC is out of sync

import_instructions: 1. Open ThingsBoard UI → Rule Chains → Import Rule Chain
3. Chain this from the Root Rule Chain using a 'Rule Chain' node for POST_ATTRIBUTES_REQUEST messages
4. Assign the Root Rule Chain to the 'Room' device profile

shadow_state_model.reported_state: CLIENT_SCOPE attributes — set by device on connect
shadow_state_model.sync_status: CLIENT_SCOPE attribute — computed by this rule chain
